title: Armorless
description: Hides armor and replaces it with belt indicators.
body:
a resource pack that hides armor and replaces it with belt indicators
to reveal the minecraft skin underneath.

![armor to no armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/640fe1040c94c7dfa50f2951c9e6a76e30ca3ace_0.webp)
